name: service_lifecycle Doctor check — present in Doctor output, status PASS (not installed yet is not a failure)
description: Runs forge-doctor and asserts the service_lifecycle check exists in the output and returns PASS (not FAIL). On Windows dev machine where forge-api is not installed, the check returns PASS with detail 'not installed yet'. On Linux/macOS/other, also returns PASS. FAIL status would indicate a code error, not a missing service.
